title: The Saracen Blade
writer: DeVallon Scott, George Worthing Yates, Frank Yerby
actors: Ricardo Montalban, Betta St. John, Rick Jason
plot: Based on the book of the same name by Frank Yerby. Pietro is an orphan who is raised by a family friend in 15th century Italy. After the friend is killed by the same nasty baron who murdered Pietro's father as he led the peasants ...
